{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212155326DFD17D5385285E181F4"}"},"total":5745},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7528314365375316798","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话看完之后，这本书百章后更多的是布局，反派这个词我觉得真的是越往后面看越能感觉到不是反派，而是“棋子”和“棋手”的转换，我看很多模拟文，这本是我唯一追更到最后的，后面的反转既在意料之外又在情理之中，而且没有传统小说的通病，看见女人走不动路，我最喜欢的地方就是，所有人或者事物都是主角可以利用的，我目前看完觉得真的可以静下心来看到后面"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752829442,"group_id":"7449282218398059545","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2VLdaRJK3+6RLU1NAshPuF3dNe5i+Js7ly0+3mHt12u","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1647496274126793","user_name":"喜欢噪钟鹊的陈嬷嬷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1647496274126793","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449282218398059545","book_info":{"abstract":"【反派模拟+高武世界+无敌横推+杀戮果断】
　　陆乾穿越了，成为了大夏帝国顶尖家族陆家的反派纨绔。
　　开局便看到了醉醺醺的天命女主柳如樾倒在面前，一动不动。
　　而身为柳如樾这位冰山校花保镖的天命主角却是不知踪迹。
　　等等，这个剧情...
　　【叮，检测到前方十米有昏迷的天命女主。】
　　【反派模拟器，启动！】
　　【使用反派点，可以进行反派人生模拟。】
　　【新手大礼包开启，宿主获得三次反派人生模拟机会。】
　　【叮，开始反派人生模拟中。】
　　【你是陆家二少，在大夏首都犯了错，来魔都避避风头，却是成为了整个魔都所有人都闻风丧胆的存在，此刻的你正准备出去找点乐子，却是意外发现了醉酒的校花柳如樾...】
　　【柳如樾是柳家千金，是魔都大学的校花，却陷入了深层次昏迷，身边那疑似有着天命加持的龙王保镖却是不在身边，你害怕柳如樾着凉，索性便下车，将其捡走...】
　　【.....】
　　【今晚，妥了...】
　　......
　　【一个小时后，匆匆赶来的天命主角看着消失不见的柳如樾，发出了凄惨的嚎叫：“不！！！”】
　　......
　【你被挖走了“至尊帝骨”，你死了。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ec8700390c15d6e85c6d2629e1e18179","author":"徐墨卿","author_id":"","book_id":"7449282218398059545","book_name":"模拟：我！反派纨绔？大夏人皇！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7449282505754034713","read_count":"90481","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1845442"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"873","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,反派,无敌,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a0e1e9b3442705ec5aaf01d85dca5baf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285332&x-signature=Yp4%2FY32XWZPhN0nGA5wGAl4LYzc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2792353190124590","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"487"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212155326DFD17D5385285E181F4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":111,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":44304,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":55281},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7509280077270418200","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"少有的需要带脑子认真读的模拟文了，没有十日终焉看起来那么烧脑，属于伏笔埋的不是很深，通常过了一两次模拟就会解开，现实世界里无疑是爽文，但是在模拟世界里还是需要小心翼翼去摸索
很久之前就看到这本书了，一直被评论区那些低星评分给吓跑，看了之后感觉这本书九点多评分还是比较真实的，主角不圣母，反派有智商，至于说主角一个反派过得很憋屈的还是分清楚模拟和现实的区别，模拟器不就是让主角在虚拟世界摸索出道路在现实世界里横推的吗[捂脸]","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":19,"text":"十日终焉","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410133285E181F4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227509280077270418200%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227449282218398059545%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%81%E6%97%A5%E7%BB%88%E7%84%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748396697,"group_id":"7449282218398059545","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N14sL3wuid+ZiFiE7S1KLJ5hJMZZt7VfTz7ffVzl1UrE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1b28dad6290b4999857f4fcbcb8847e5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616785&x-signature=xVfU11Q9e4kU8B6dSKUo3bLY9Gw%3D","user_id":"1344064597537961","user_name":"catch0318"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1344064597537961","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449282218398059545","book_info":{"abstract":"【反派模拟+高武世界+无敌横推+杀戮果断】
